popularStory.description: John Heard was born about 1604. he married Isabel who was born about 1608. It is believed that John Heard came to the Colonies on the ship, Warwick. He first settled in Grand Isle, Maine. he moved to …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Captain John Heard於1612年11月29日出生在英國英格蘭素可其斯特時，他的父親Thomas Heard26歲，母親Elizabeth Cutler22歲。他於1642年與Elizabeth Hull在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼越可爾吉特利結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他於1634年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼越可爾吉特利。他去世於1689年1月17日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾斯特拉福德多福享年76歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Captain John Heard于1612年11月29日出生在英国英格兰素可其斯特时，他的父亲Thomas Heard26岁，母亲Elizabeth Cutler22岁。他于1642年与Elizabeth Hull在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼越可爾吉特利结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他于1634年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼越可爾吉特利。他去世于1689年1月17日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾斯特拉福德多福享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: Heard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English herd(e), hird(e), hord(e), Older Scots herd, hird ‘herdsman’, i.e. one who looked after cattle, sheep, or goats (Old English heorde, hierde). Compare Hardman .

variants.name: Hirt
meanings: German: occupational name for a herdsman, Middle High German hirt, cognate with English Heard .

variants.name: Hardman
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English herdeman, herdema+n, hurdeman (Old English hierdeman, heordman) ‘herdsman, one who tends livestock’. Compare Heard .
English: occasionally from the Middle English personal name Hardman (Old English Heardmann, literally ‘hard man’).
English and Irish: shortened form of   Hardeman  .

variants.name: Heird
meanings: Scottish: probably a variant of   Heard  .

variants.name: Hard
meanings: English: variant of   Heard  . Compare   Hardman  .

English, German, Dutch, and Swedish (Hård): nickname for a stern or severe man, from Middle English, Middle Low German hard, Middle Dutch hart, hert, Swedish hård ‘hard, inflexible’. The Swedish name was probably originally a soldier's name.

English: topographic name denoting a dweller on hard, firm ground, from a transferred use of the adjective in 2 above, or perhaps sometimes from a landing-place, as in the modern Hampshire use of the term hard. Compare Hardacre .

variants.name: Herd
meanings: Scottish (Fife) and English: variant of   Heard  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Massachusetts Colony Gains Control of New Hampshire
historicEvents.description: In 1641, Massachusetts gained control of New Hampshire until 1679 when New Hampshire became a separate royal colony.

historicEvents.title: First Recorded Slave in Portsmouth
historicEvents.description: In 1645, an African American man taken from Guinea was captured and brought to New Hampshire, he would be counted as the first African American slave in New Hampshire.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Black Heritage Trail in New Hampshire- Our African Heritage

en.lifeSummary: When Captain John Heard was born on 29 November 1612, in Chichester, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Heard, was 26 and his mother, Elizabeth Cutler, was 22. He married Elizabeth Hull in 1642, in Kittery, Yorkshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 7 daughters. He immigrated to Kittery, Yorkshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America in 1634. He died on 17 January 1689, in Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Captain John Heard est né le 29 novembre 1612, à Chichester, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Heard, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Cutler, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Hull en 1642, à Kittery, Yorkshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 7 filles. Il a immigré au Kittery, Yorkshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1634. Il est décédé le 17 janvier 1689, à Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 76 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Captain John Heard am 29. November 1612 in Chichester, Sussex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Heard 26 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Cutler 22. Er hat 1642 in Kittery, Yorkshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Elizabeth Hull geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er ist 1634 nach Kittery, Yorkshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America eingewandert. Er starb am 17. Januar 1689 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Captain John Heard è nato il il 29 novembre 1612 nel Chichester, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Heard, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Cutler, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Hull nel 1642, nel Kittery, Yorkshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 7 figlie. Immigrato nel Kittery, Yorkshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America nel 1634. Morì il 17 gennaio 1689, nel Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, all'età di 76 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Captain John Heardが1612年11月29日にイギリスイギリススセックスチチェスターで生まれた時，父Thomas Heardは26歳，母Elizabeth Cutlerは22歳であった。1642年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーヨークシュアイアキッテリーでElizabeth Hullと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1634年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーヨークシュアイアキッテリーに移住した。彼は1689年1月17日にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアストラフォードドバーで76歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Captain John Heard(이)가 1612년 11월 29일 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 치체스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Heard(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Cutler(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1642년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 요르크실르 키터이에서 Elizabeth Hull(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1634년에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 요르크실르 키터이로 이민을 떠났다. 그는 1689년 1월 17일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 스트래퍼드 도버에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Captain John Heard nasceu em 29 de novembro de 1612, em Chichester, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Heard, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Cutler, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Hull em 1642, em Kittery, Yorkshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele imigrou para o Kittery, Yorkshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America em 1634. Ele faleceu em 17 de janeiro de 1689, em Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, com 76 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Captain John Heard родился 29 ноября 1612 г. в местности шичестир, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Heard было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Cutler, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Hull в 1642 г. в местности киттири, еркшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Он иммигрировал в киттири, еркшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1634 году. Он умер 17 января 1689 г. в местности довир, страффорд, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 76 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Captain John Heard nació el 29 de noviembre de 1612, en Chichester, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Heard, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Cutler, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Hull en 1642, en Kittery, Yorkshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 7 hijas. Inmigró a Kittery, Yorkshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America en 1634. Murió el 17 de enero de 1689, en Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, a la edad de 76 años.
